subtitleLanding: ImpulseOS. The system of action for telecom operators. Network Intelligence & Agentic CRM. One unified brain.
heroRequestErrorMsg: Something went wrong. Please try again.
solNetworkDesc: Your network never sleeps. Neither does Telemetrics. Continuous multi-vendor monitoring across 35+ native integrations. Cisco, Huawei, ZTE, Ubiquiti, and more — giving Fiber Providers, WISPs, and Managed Service Providers a single source of truth across their entire infrastructure.
solCrmDesc: The industry's first network-aware CRM. Fusing live subscriber telemetry with Agentic AI to intercept churn, resolve billing disputes autonomously, and trigger predictive growth triggers.
solSupportDesc: Beyond basic chat. AI agents with direct wire-access to your OSS, capable of autonomous line diagnostics, signal strength analysis, and remote ONT recalibration in real-time.
solBillingDesc: Unified charging for Voice, Data, and TV. A real-time OCS that processes TR-069 telemetry to meter bandwidth, trigger automated dunning, and issue SLA credits on outages instantly.
solAdvisoryDesc: Paid strategic partnership to solve the "Disconnected Silo" problem. From 14-day Network Revenue Audits to full Operational KPI Ownership, we operationalize AI that actually works.
pillarNetworkHero: Multi-vendor network intelligence and deep telemetry across your entire infrastructure.
pillarNetworkHeroSubtitle: Multi-vendor network intelligence that turns raw telemetry into actionable insight.
pillarNetworkQuote: Your network generates millions of data points every hour. Legacy tools drown you in noise. Telemetrics distills it into the only signals that matter.
pillarNetworkStepEdge: Collect from every CPE, OLT, and core device in real time.
pillarNetworkStepIngest: Normalize SNMP, TR-069, streaming telemetry into a unified schema.
pillarNetworkStepAnalyze: Correlate, deduplicate, and surface root cause with ML models.
pillarNetworkStepAction: Auto-remediate, alert NOC, or trigger CRM workflows instantly.
pillarNetworkImpact: One core router failure triggers 561 downstream alarms in legacy tools. Telemetrics fires one. Your NOC focuses on the cause, not the noise.
pillarNetworkSovereignDesc: Full data residency compliance. Your telemetry never leaves your jurisdiction unless you say so.
pillarNetworkSovFeat1Desc: AI models run locally in your region. No data crosses borders for processing.
pillarNetworkSovFeat2Desc: End-to-end encryption at rest and in transit. No third-party access to raw telemetry.
pillarNetworkSovFeat3Desc: Deploy on any cloud, on-prem, or hybrid. No vendor lock-in on infrastructure.
pillarNetworkSovFeat4Desc: Built for GDPR, LGPD, and regional telecom compliance from day one.
pillarNetworkEcoDesc: 35+ native integrations across every major network vendor. One platform, every device.
pillarNetworkAdvantageTitle: Engage automatically flags every at-risk subscriber on that circuit.
pillarNetworkAdvantageDesc: This is where monitoring ends and operations begin. We don't just tell you the network is broken — we tell you exactly which revenue streams are in jeopardy before the first ticket is even opened.
pillarNetworkBridgeDesc: Telemetrics identifies the failure. Engage identifies the impact.
pillarCrmHero: The industry's first network-aware CRM powered by Agentic AI.
pillarCrmQuote: Operators don't lose customers to competitors. They lose them to silence. By the time a customer calls to cancel, your network was already warning you — weeks ago.
pillarCrmCap1Desc: Signal strength, packet loss, reboot history, and SLA compliance — all inside every customer record.
pillarCrmCap2Desc: Network degradation predicts cancellations 2–4 weeks before the call. Engage flags at-risk subscribers automatically.
pillarCrmCap3Desc: Automated outreach triggers the moment network signals indicate risk.
pillarCrmGapHeadline: Reactive CRMs Cost You Subscribers Every Day.
pillarCrmLegacy2: Waits for the customer to call
pillarCrmImpulse1: Live telemetry inside every subscriber record
pillarCrmImpulse4: Upsell triggered by real usage patterns
pillarCrmWf1Desc: Telemetrics identifies degraded signal, packet loss spikes, or unusual reboot patterns linked to a subscriber account.
pillarCrmWf2Desc: AI agents autonomously trigger retention workflows — credits, plan adjustments, or proactive outreach — without human intervention.
pillarCrmWf3Desc: High-usage subscribers are flagged for upsell. AI recommends the optimal plan upgrade and timing based on live consumption data.
pillarCrmDemoDesc: Explore a live walkthrough of the Agentic CRM — from subscriber 360 views to automated churn interception.
pillarCrmImpactDesc: Operators using Impulse Engage see up to 40% churn reduction and an average ARPU lift of $12.40 per subscriber. The AI doesn't just track customers — it fights for them.
pillarSupportHero: AI agents with direct wire-access to your OSS for autonomous diagnostics and resolution.
pillarSupportHeroSubtitle: Agentic Problem Resolution at the Wire Layer.
pillarSupportQuote: Beyond basic chat. AI agents capable of autonomous line diagnostics, signal strength analysis, and remote ONT recalibration in real-time.
pillarSupportProblem: LLMs are smart. But they can't see the wire.
pillarSupportOld3: Generic responses with no network context
pillarSupportNew3: Knows router health before the conversation
pillarSupportOmniDesc: Your subscribers reach out on different channels. Impulse meets them wherever they are — with the same deep network intelligence powering every conversation.
pillarSupportChWebDesc: Embedded widget on your operator portal. Resolves in-session.
pillarSupportChWhatsAppDesc: Your subscribers' preferred channel in emerging markets.
pillarSupportChVoiceDesc: Replaces your IVR. Conversational AI with sub-3-second latency.
pillarSupportChEmailDesc: Triage, classify, and respond autonomously. Escalate only when needed.
pillarSupportChSmsDesc: Proactive outreach and two-way resolution. No app required.
pillarSupportContextTitle: The AI Knows Everything Before It Says a Word.
pillarSupportCtxRouterDesc: Real-time signal levels, packet loss, latency, and device status pulled directly from TR-069 before the conversation starts.
pillarSupportCtxChurnDesc: ML-driven churn probability so the agent knows whether this is a routine call or a save-the-customer moment.
pillarSupportCtxPlanDesc: Current plan tier, contracted SLA, billing status, and any open credits or disputes — loaded instantly.
pillarSupportCtxHistoryDesc: Full ticket timeline, previous resolutions, repeat-call patterns, and agent notes from every past interaction.
pillarSupportProactiveTitle: Don't Wait for the Call. Make It First.
pillarSupportTrigDegDesc: Network quality drops below threshold. The AI sends a proactive SMS or WhatsApp check-in to the affected subscriber — before they notice anything is wrong.
pillarSupportTrigDegStat: Prevents hundreds of inbound calls per outage event
pillarSupportTrigOutageBadge: TRIGGER: MULTIPLE DEVICES OFFLINE · SAME AREA
pillarSupportTrigOutageDesc: Multiple devices go offline in the same geography. The AI sends mass notifications with estimated time to resolution across all affected subscribers simultaneously.
pillarSupportTrigOutageStat: Eliminates call center surge during outages
pillarSupportTrigChurnDesc: Churn risk spikes on a subscriber with recent support frustration. The Churn Rescue Agent initiates a retention conversation — reviews 90-day quality history, presents a personalized offer, saves the account.
pillarSupportTrigChurnStat: Activates before the customer considers leaving
pillarSupportCopilotTitle: When AI Hands Off, It Doesn't Step Away.
pillarSupportCopilotDesc: Two modes: full handoff or co-pilot. In co-pilot mode, the AI stays live alongside your human agent — providing real-time network context, suggested responses, and one-click actions.
pillarSupportCopilotCustomer: I want to cancel. This is the third time this month my internet went down.
pillarSupportCopilotAI: Acknowledge frustration. 3 outages confirmed in network data. Offer SLA credit ($23.40) + free speed upgrade for 3 months.
pillarBillingHero: The first revenue lifecycle platform purpose-built for ISPs — from the first invoice to the last collection.
pillarBillingHeroSubtitle: Revenue Lifecycle at the Wire Layer.
pillarBillingGapTitle: Most ISPs Are Running Their Revenue on Tools That Were Never Built for Telecom.
pillarBillingGapDesc: Spreadsheets, generic ERPs, and disconnected billing tools weren't designed for the complexity of recurring telecom revenue. The result: leaked revenue, manual reconciliation, and zero real-time visibility.
pillarBillingCoreTitle: Every Dollar. From Subscription to Collection.
pillarBillingCap1Desc: Create, modify, suspend, resume, renew, and cancel recurring subscriptions with automatic re-rating.
pillarBillingCap2Desc: Individual or bulk generation with tax calculations, credit notes, PDF generation, and automated email.
pillarBillingCap3Desc: Multiple gateway integrations, multi-currency support, payments auto-applied to invoices.
pillarBillingCap4Desc: Configurable rules engine with progressive escalation and automated service suspension.
pillarBillingPricingTitle: Any Pricing Model Your Business Runs.
pillarBillingPricing1Desc: Define unlimited plan tiers with automatic upgrades, downgrades, and prorated transitions between billing cycles.
pillarBillingPricing2Desc: Real-time balance management, quota allocation, and session-aware charging for prepaid and hybrid models.
pillarBillingPricing3Desc: Metered billing with configurable rate cards, volume discounts, and real-time CDR processing for any usage metric.
pillarBillingAcctTitle: The Only ISP Billing Platform With a Full Accounting Module Built In.
pillarBillingAcctDesc: No more exporting CSVs into QuickBooks. Impulse includes a complete double-entry accounting system designed for telecom revenue streams.
pillarBillingContractsDesc: Generate contracts from plan templates, send for e-signature, and automatically activate services upon signing — zero manual handoff.
pillarBillingPayDesc: A branded portal where subscribers view invoices, make payments, upgrade plans, and manage their own accounts — reducing support load.
pillarBillingCloseTitle: Your network is already intelligent. Your billing should be too.
pillarAdvisoryHero: Advisory isn't generic consulting. We embed inside your operation, diagnose revenue leakage, and own the KPIs that matter — before you ever commit to a platform.
pillarAdvisoryProblem: 90% of Telecom AI Pilots Fail. Not Because the AI Is Bad.
pillarAdvisoryProblemDesc: They fail because the operator's systems are disconnected — billing doesn't talk to network, CRM doesn't see churn signals, and nobody diagnosed the real problem first.
pillarAdvisoryFlywheelTitle: Advisory Is the Entry Point. The Platform Is the Destination.
pillarAdvisoryFlywheelDesc: Every Advisory engagement is designed as a flywheel — each phase builds on the last, converting insight into action and action into platform adoption.
pillarAdvisoryStep1Desc: We place our Telemetrics server in your NOC and spend 30 days mapping your network, revenue, and churn reality.
pillarAdvisoryStep2Desc: Full executive report — billing mismatches, ghost subscribers, upsell gaps, churn drivers, and a prioritized action plan.
pillarAdvisoryStep3Desc: We guide or execute the implementation — configuring ImpulseOS, deploying AI agents, or owning specific KPIs.
pillarAdvisoryStep4Desc: Advisory clients convert to full ImpulseOS at a preferred rate. By this point, ROI is already proven.
pillarAdvisoryServicesTitle: Five Ways We Engage. One Goal — Revenue Protection.
pillarAdvisorySvc1Desc: We connect to your network and billing systems, map every revenue leak, and deliver an executive report with prioritized recovery actions.
pillarAdvisorySvc2Desc: A structured evaluation of your data maturity, system integrations, and organizational readiness for AI-driven operations.
pillarAdvisorySvc3Desc: Hands-on guidance through AI deployment — from vendor selection and architecture design to pilot execution and KPI tracking.
pillarAdvisorySvc4Desc: We own specific performance metrics — churn rate, ARPU growth, resolution time — and are compensated based on results.
pillarAdvisorySvc5Desc: Design and deploy an AI-first support model — channel strategy, escalation logic, agent training, and automation roadmap.
pillarAdvisoryCtaTitle: A $5,000 Network Revenue Audit Gives You Answers in 30 Days.
pillarAdvisoryCtaDesc: No platform commitment. No lengthy onboarding. We connect, audit, and hand you an executive report showing exactly where your revenue is leaking.
pillarAdvisoryCtaQuote: The audit pays for itself. Every time.
pillarAdvisoryCloseLine2: We know what breaks before you deploy it.
pillarAdvisoryCloseDesc: With 15 years inside telecom operations, Impulse Advisory gives you the strategic clarity to invest in AI with confidence — not hope.
pillarCrmHeroSubtitle: Your CRM Has Never Seen Your Network. Engage Has.
pillarCrmHeroDesc: Engage fuses live subscriber telemetry with Agentic AI to intercept churn, resolve issues autonomously, and trigger predictive growth — all before the customer picks up the phone.
pillarCrmAgenticTitle: 82% of Issues. Resolved Autonomously. Under 90 Seconds.
pillarCrmAgenticDesc: Five specialized AI agents work in parallel — diagnosing network faults, resolving billing disputes, rescuing at-risk subscribers, and orchestrating retention workflows — without human intervention.
pillarCrmAgentTechDesc: Diagnoses signal degradation, runs remote ONT recalibration, and resolves connectivity issues via TR-069.
pillarCrmAgentBillingDesc: Audits invoice disputes, applies credits autonomously, and reconciles payment mismatches in real-time.
pillarCrmAgentChurnDesc: Detects at-risk subscribers via network signals and triggers retention offers before the cancellation call.
pillarCrmGrowQuote: 2,000 subscribers consistently hitting their plan limit — and nobody told Sales.
pillarCrmGrowCap1Desc: AI identifies subscribers consistently exceeding plan limits and recommends the optimal upgrade path and timing.
pillarCrmGrowCap2Desc: Network usage patterns reveal expansion opportunities — new locations, bandwidth upgrades, and service bundling.
pillarCrmGrowCap3Desc: Real-time revenue analytics with churn forecasting, ARPU trends, and cohort analysis across your subscriber base.
pillarCrmCloseLine2: Engage knows your customers AND your network.
pillarCrmCloseDesc: The only CRM that fuses subscriber data with live network telemetry — giving your team the full picture before every interaction, every decision, every retention play.
indexMax: Maximize revenue, optimize processes, and reduce cost with our solutions
contactTitle: Please provide the details and we'll promptly follow up with you.
indexSolveDescription: Three powerful capabilities working together to transform your telecom operations into a revenue-generating engine.

option1.title: Built for CSPs
option1.details: Not another general CRM. We speak SNMP, bandwidth, IPs, ARPU, and NPS.

option2.title: Sales Acceleration
option2.details: Spot customer needs before they call. Trigger offers before they churn

option3.title: Live Network Intelligence
option3.details: Real-time dashboards across performance, uptime, and consumption.

option4.title: Retention & Monetization
option4.details: Smart alerts when customers exceed usage, go offline, or signal risk.

option5.title: Streamline your processes
option5.details: We've dedicated thousands of hours to refining every process in your organization, crafting our software stack with the best practices for your business, enabling you to improve your NPS score and boost revenue.

capabilitiesSection.title: Capabilities That Drive Results
capabilitiesSection.description: Dive deep into each pillar and see how Impulse transforms your operations.

telecomCRM.label: Telecom CRM
telecomCRM.title: Purpose-Built CRM for Telecom Operations
telecomCRM.description: A modern CRM designed specifically for telecom operators. Manage subscriber relationships, track service history, and drive revenue-all in one platform. Use standalone or integrate with your existing CRM.

features.0: Subscriber 360° view with network performance, billing history, service tickets, and interaction logs.
features.1: Telecom-specific workflows for installations, upgrades, service changes, and support.
features.2: Unified data platform that connects network data, billing systems, and customer interactions in real time.
features.3: Flexible deployment to run as your primary CRM or layer on top of Salesforce, HubSpot, or other platforms.

teamAcceleration.label: Team Acceleration
teamAcceleration.title: Turn Every Rep Into a Top Performer
teamAcceleration.description: AI-powered coaching that learns from your best performers and scales excellence across your entire team. Real-time guidance during calls and personalized training based on individual performance patterns.

features.0: Live call coaching with best-practice prompts delivered in the moment.
features.1: Performance analysis across transcripts and behaviors to surface improvement areas.
features.2: Personalized training paths based on each rep's strengths and gaps.
features.3: Best practice sharing that captures what top performers do and amplifies it automatically.

revenueAcceleration.label: Revenue Acceleration
revenueAcceleration.title: One Platform, All Your Systems
revenueAcceleration.description: Break down data silos with a unified operating layer that connects network infrastructure, billing systems, CRM, and OSS/BSS. Your AI assistant understands business context across every system.

features.0: Network integration via SNMP, ICMP, Netflow, and VictoriaMetrics for end-to-end visibility.
features.1: Billing and CRM sync to keep pricing, accounts, and provisioning aligned.
features.2: Real-time alerts for outages, latency, and overages with automated response workflows.
features.3: AI assistant that executes commands and automates tasks across all connected systems.

agenticAI.label: Agentic AI
agenticAI.title: AI That Acts on Your Behalf
agenticAI.description: Deploy autonomous AI agents that do more than alert you-they act. Retain at-risk customers automatically, execute upsell campaigns, and deliver 24/7 support without human intervention.

features.0: Retention Agent that reaches out with tailored offers before customers churn.
features.1: Upsell Agent that finds expansion opportunities and launches campaigns autonomously.
features.2: Support Agent (Inbound) that authenticates, troubleshoots, and resolves without wait times.
features.3: Support Agent (Outbound) for proactive updates, outage notifications, and feedback loops.

revenueIntelligence.label: Revenue Intelligence
revenueIntelligence.title: Predictive Revenue Intelligence
revenueIntelligence.description: Transform every data point - network performance, customer interactions, usage patterns - into actionable revenue intelligence so you see opportunities before competitors do.

features.0: AI churn prediction to pinpoint who is likely to leave and why.
features.1: Customer health scoring that blends engagement, satisfaction, and network insights.
features.2: Bandwidth intelligence that highlights usage trends and upgrade opportunities.
features.3: Sentiment analysis that listens to every conversation for emotion and intent signals.

missionTitle: We built Impulse because we lived it.
missionDescription: Telecoms are losing billions to disconnected software and operators too comfortable to change. We work with the operators who are serious about the future. The rest will be gone in five years anyway.
visionTitle: Every subscriber deserves a connected experience.
visionDescription: A world where every subscriber gets the connected experience they deserve and every operator has the intelligence to deliver it. More profitability. Better service.
indexSolveProblemsText-1: Predictive insights from network performance to customer sentiment. Know which customers will churn, who is ready to upgrade, and where network issues cost you money.
indexSolveProblemsText-2: AI agents that work alongside your team. Proactively engage at-risk customers, execute retention campaigns, provide 24/7 support, and surface insights—amplifying your team's impact and freeing them to focus on high-value interactions.
indexSolveProblemsText-3: Turn insights into dollars. Identify upsell opportunities, launch targeted campaigns, and close revenue gaps—all automated. Your entire team becomes more productive with AI doing the heavy lifting.
indexBPOText: Our BPO Services include Layer 1 & 2 support, sales (outbound & inbound) and collections. Streamline your business operations and enhance customer satisfaction.
indexManagedText: With years of experience we have learned which ads yield positive results and which ones do not. We deliver the highest ROAS for your ad campaigns.
indexSalesText: From Impulse leads an innovative lead generation platform for CSPs to Telemetrics a ground breaking solution to uncover upsell and cross-sale opportunities. We are obsessed with making you more profitable.
indexOurSolutionsDescription-1: Empower your B2B endeavors with the crucial data and software to effortlessly connect and seal deals with your most valuable buyers, all conveniently integrated in one piace.
indexOurSolutionsDescription-2: Boost residential and corporate upsell and cross-sale opportunities by up to 200% with the help of AI and ML.
indexOurSolutionsDescription-3: Improve Customer Satisfaction, Boost Sales, and Minimize Churn with Impulse Bot—an innovative AI and ML-powered chatbot designed to assist your customers round the clock.
indexOurSolutionsDescription-4: We create websites and develop mobile applications to support the growth of telecoms and communication service providers.
indexOurSolutionsDescription-5: Streamline your billing processes, enhance customer satisfaction, and simplify payments with Impulse Pays user-friendly portal.
indexOurSolutionsDescription-6: Our BPO services include sales, support, and outbound services to streamline your business operations and enhance customer satisfaction.
indexOurIntegrationPartnersDescription: We aim to assist our clients in increasing their revenue, minimizing expenses,and optimizing their processes through our solutions via automation and analytics.
aboutUsExecutiveTeamFounderCEODescriptio: Software Engineer and Technologist with over 15 years in telecommunications. Brian has been developing AI and NLP solutions since 2015 and has worked across every layer of telecom - from engineering and managing full NOC environments and TV services to Sales Engineering and top sales executive at multiple CSPs. He founded Impulse to solve the problem he lived every day: operators flying blind on revenue, churn, and customer intelligence.
aboutUsExecutiveTeamCOFounderDescription: Currently - Google Telco Industry Business Principal working with telco’s on AI and Cloud transformation A former CEO of a startup to  $50M/ARR CSP, McNabb brings a wealth of experience knowing exactly what our target market needs to succeed
aboutUsExecutiveTeamTimDescription: Former CEO in the entertainment and broadband industries, recognized for leading innovation in digital engagement. He developed a CRM platform for livestreaming organizations to boost community interaction and user retention.
aboutUsLeadingIndustryDescription: We spent 15 years inside telecom operations before writing a single line of code. Every feature in ImpulseOS exists because we lived the problem first — managing networks, fighting churn, reconciling billing, and scaling support across emerging markets.
aboutUsMissionDescription-1: The telecommunications industry holds vast untapped potential.
aboutUsMissionSubDescription-1: Our aim is to assist companies in increasing their profitability through our solutions and services. We are dedicated to creating most innovative solutions for the industry and achieving this by attentively listening to our customers and being their most reliable partners.
aboutUsVisionDescription-1: Our vision is to be the leading provider of telecom solutions worldwide.
aboutUsVisionSubDescription-1: We are committed to developing most innovative technology, tools, and services for our partners, and are dedicated to making this vision a reality. We are constantly seeking out new talent and innovative technologies to help us achieve our goal, and our partners will benefit from our relentless pursuit of excellence.
aboutUsClientValuesDescription-1: We encourage creative thinking, experimenting, and willingness to take a risk to bring new ideas to life
aboutUsClientValuesDescription-2: We strive to create exceptional experiences for our customers. We listen to their feedback and use it continuously to improve our products and services
aboutUsClientValuesDescription-3: We value long-term thinking over short-term gains. We prioritize sustainability and growth, even if it means sacrificing immediate profits in order to build a strong lasting company.
aboutUsClientValuesDescription-4: We encourage our team to take ownership of their work and decisions. Take the initiative and make decisions that will benefit the company but also take responsibility of the outcomes and learn from your mistakes.
aboutUsClientValuesDescription-5: We strive for excellence in all areas of operations, aiming for efficiency, productivity and quality. We set a high standard of performance and continuously measure and improve processes to achieve optimal results
whatWeDoTitle: Specialized telecom software delivered with deep industry experience
whatWeDoDescription-1: Advanced analytics for telecoms. Enhance visibility, simplify management, and optimize operations with our intelligent solution.
whatWeDoDescription-2: Improve Customer Satisfaction, Boost Sales, and Minimize Churn with Impulse Bot—an innovative AI and ML-powered chatbot designed to assist your customers round the clock.
whatWeDoDescription-3: Our BPO services include sales, support, and outbound services to streamline your business operations and enhance customer satisfaction.
whatWeDoDescription-4: Custom web solutions, billing systems, API development, and CRM integrations for telecommunications. Tailored to your unique needs, scalable solutions that drive growth and enhance customer satisfaction
whatWeDoDescription-5: Empower your B2B endeavors with the crucial data and software to effortlessly connect and seal deals with your most valuable buyers, all conveniently integrated in one piace.
whatWeDoDescription-6: Streamline your billing processes, enhance customer satisfaction, and simplify payments with Impulse Pays user-friendly portal. Say goodbye to long queues and complex procedures. Upgrade your telecom services effortlessly and experience the power of automation.
telemetricsSubtitle-1: Telemetrics is a revolutionary SaaS solution to increase upsell and cross sell opportunities by up to 200%
telemetricsSubtitle-2: Telemetrics analysis bandwidth trends and behaviours from your residential and corporate customers and proactively sends emails and sms at the perfect time for them to upgrade increasing revenue immediately!
telemetricsSubtitle-3: When was the last time you told your customers they needed an upgrade?
telemetricsSubtitle-4: Don't be discouraged; you're in the same boat as 95% of ISPs. The process of achieving these integrations is challenging and expensive. The major ISPs have already poured millions into developing this technology. Impulse is leveling the playing field for small and medium-sized ISPs, and Telemetrics is a revolutionary advancement!
telemetricsSubtitle-6: Significant revenue potential is going untapped. Impulse not only identifies these opportunities but also actively contributes to realizing this revenue by handling trend analysis and the execution of sales campaigns. We provide recommendations for email and SMS copy and facilitate their distribution. Our objective is to deliver the outcomes to your doorstep

telemetricsForm-2: Please provide the details and we'll

anws.1: Turn boring web forms into friendly conversations
anws.2: Get your meetings and sales calls scheduled

anws.1: If you're still operating in the traditional manner, it can take time to convert, keep, and increase your consumer base. To grow your pipeline and convert customers like never before, you need an automated chatbot powered by AI.
Generate more qualified leads on autopilot

anws.1: Supercharge your workforce with customer service ai bots that work alongside your team as trusted digital team members, not just a tool — a fully automated system which helps you respond intelligently faster.

botInfoSocials-1.subtitle: Conversations are a natural way to engage your website visitors.Capture attention in real time, build stronger relationships and increase conversion rates.

benefits.1: Turn you visitors into paying customers

botInfoSocials-2.subtitle: Build your community on telegram & engage with them using Botsify Chatbot. Chatbot for telegram can help you achieve more sales & improved conversion rates.

bpoInfoMainSubtitle: Get ready to discover why our IMPULSE BPO services are the perfect choice for your business.
bpoInfoServiceTitle: We offer additional features that make us the ultimate BPO service provider

bpoInfoService-1.title: Dedicated Account Managers
bpoInfoService-1.description: Your dedicated account manager ensures personalized attention, smooth communication, and addresses concerns throughout our partnership.

bpoInfoService-2.title: Customized Solutions
bpoInfoService-2.description: We tailor our services to meet your unique needs and goals, ensuring a perfect fit for your business.

bpoInfoService-3.title: Scalability
bpoInfoService-3.description: We handle fluctuating workloads and accommodate your growth, providing the scalability your business requires.

bpoInfoService-4.title: Data Security
bpoInfoService-4.description: We prioritize data security and confidentiality, adhering to the highest standards and implementing robust measures to protect your information.

bpoInfoService-5.title: Quality Assurance
bpoInfoService-5.description: Our rigorous quality control processes and ongoing training programs guarantee high-quality results and continuous improvement.

productInfo-1.title: Product Design and Development
productInfo-1.description: We specialize in creating custom web applications that include websites, billing portals, CRM integrations, billing system integrations, and automation. Our team of experts understands the industry-specific needs of our clients and delivers solutions that are tailored to their unique requirements.
productInfo-1.subtitle: Here are 5 reasons why our customers should choose our Product Design and Development services

productInfo-2.title: Customized Solutions
productInfo-2.paragraph: Our team works closely with each client to understand their unique needs and business objectives. We then develop customized solutions that are tailored to their specific requirements.

productInfo-3.title: Expertise
productInfo-3.paragraph: Our team consists of experienced professionals who have a deep understanding of the telecommunication industry. They are equipped with the knowledge and skills to deliver cuttingedge solutions that meet our clients' business needs

productInfo-4.title: Quality Assurance
productInfo-4.paragraph: We follow a rigorous quality assurance process to ensure that our solutions are of the highest quality. Our team conducts thorough testing and quality checks to ensure that our clients receive solutions that are reliable, secure, and user-friendly.

productInfo-5.title: Timely Delivery
productInfo-5.paragraph: We understand the importance of meeting deadlines and delivering solutions on time. Our team works diligently to ensure that our solutions are delivered within a agreed-upon timeframe.

productInfo-6.title: Continuous Support
productInfo-6.paragraph: Our commitment to our clients does not end with the delivery of our solutions. We offer continuous support and maintenance services to ensure that our clients' applications are running smoothly and efficiently.

leadsInfoMainSubtitle: Are you struggling to find and close leads? Our platform can help! With over 265M contacts, you will be able to reach your target audience and help you grow your business.

leadsInfo-1.mainTitle: Reasons you should focus on lead generation
leadsInfo-1.paragraph-1: Content creation and communication are a big part of lead generation efforts.
leadsInfo-1.paragraph-2: When done correctly, lead generation can maximize your brand’s ability for reaching target prospects.

leadsInfo-2.title: Contents
leadsInfo-2.paragraph: The only sales platform with everything you need to find, email, call and close your ideal customers, all in one place.

leadsInfoContent-1.title: Ideal leads at your fingertips
leadsInfoContent-1.description: Find and target your ideal buyers with the world's largest, most accurate B2B database.

leadsInfoContent-2.title: Find the right leads for you

payInfo-1.title: Impulse Pay
payInfo-1.subtitle: The Future of Payments
payInfo-1.paragraph: In a world where seamless transactions and customer satisfaction reign supreme, Impulse Pay is the perfect solution for telecommunication companies.

payInfo-2.title: Some of the best features
payInfo-2.paragraph: Impulse Pay is a pre-built customer billing portal that makes it easy for your customers to settle their bills online any time, anywhere.

payInfo-3.title: Easy, Fast & One Click Payment
payInfo-3.paragraph-1: Our automated system allows customers to set up auto pay. Impulse Pay's automated system makes it easy for your customers to set up auto pay. They can simply log in to their account and pay their bill with a few clicks of a button.
payInfo-3.paragraph-2: Impulse Pay's automated system makes it easy for your customers to set up auto pay.
payInfo-3.paragraph-3: They can simply log in to their account and pay their bill with a few clicks of a button.
payInfo-3.paragraph-4: With Impulse Pay, your customers can seamlessly upgrade their packages, explore new offers, and take advantage of exciting promotions.

payInfo-4.title: Your money is 100% safe with us
payInfo-4.paragraph: Sometimes you don’t know who you can and cannot trust. I still learn that over and over again.

payInfo-5.title: Goodbye to long queues and cumbersome processes
payInfo-5.paragraph: With Impulse Pay, your customers can say goodbye to long queues and cumbersome processes.

payInfo-6: This ensures that their bills are paid on time every time, so they never have to worry about missing a payment or incurring late fees.

impulseWebsiteDesign.description: Impulse focuses on digital marketing for telecom companies. We build websites, mobile apps, and manage marketing to help telecoms & communication service providers achieve growth.

websitesForLeadGeneration.title: Websites for Lead Generation
websitesForLeadGeneration.description: Telecom companies need websites that attract leads, customers, partners and advocates. We build websites that make publishing easy, are highly responsive, dynamic and optimized to convert.

responsiveIntegratedOptimized.title: Responsive, Integrated, Optimized
responsiveIntegratedOptimized.description: Websites are the center piece for Inbound marketing. Websites must be built with careful consideration of SEO, social sharing, content strategy, marketing automation, dynamic personalization, lead scoring, and progessive profiling.

whyEveryBusinessNeedsAWebsite.title: Why Every Business Needs A Website?

CREDIBILITY.title: CREDIBILITY
CREDIBILITY.text: One of the main reasons you should have a website for your business is to increase your organization's credibility. Chances are there are several providers offering a similar service to yours. One way you can stand out is by having a website that looks good and clearly communicates quality information to your consumers. Without a website, people may question your legitimacy as a business. Having a website is an opportunity to make a great first impression and give people comfort that you’re a real business.

BRAND.title: BRAND
BRAND.text: Showcasing your brand to your prospective customers is one of the most important things that you can do. By clearly establishing who you are, what you represent and what you stand for, you increase the chances of your customers buying from you. This is also something that can set you apart from your competitors. Without a website, it can be incredibly challenging to do this because people can't easily find quality and reliable information on your business.

LEADS.title: LEADS
LEADS.text: Perhaps one of the most intriguing reasons to have a website for your business is because it can increase your chances of getting leads. Once people find you online, become interested in your product or service and want to know more, they'll know how to contact you thanks to the information on your website, which gives you the opportunity to increase your sales. Even though websites have a cost, when used correctly, they have a positive ROI.

ORGANIC_TRAFFIC.title: ORGANIC TRAFFIC
ORGANIC_TRAFFIC.text: Once you're online and have an SEO-optimized website, you have a chance of showing up in Google search results. This means that when people are searching for a product or service, there is a chance your website will show up in the results. This gives you the opportunity to drastically increase your customer base.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: We are committed to protecting your personal data and being transparent about how we use it.
privacyPage.aboutText: Impulse Limited ("Impulse") is a global company with its headquarters in Grand Cayman that develops, implements, and supports proprietary customer care and solutions for service providers within telecommunications sectors in 40+ countries.
privacyPage.aboutNote: Impulse is fully committed to ensuring the proper management and use of all personal data it collects and handles it in compliance with applicable privacy laws, including GDPR, UK DPA, and the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework.
privacyPage.contactSubtitle: For any questions about this policy or to exercise your rights

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our services.
termsPage.introText: These Terms of Service (or "TOS") are part of the Contract between you and Impulse.
termsPage.introNote: These TOS incorporate any additional terms contained in any paper or online order form for any Service(s), as well as any brochure, user guides, and any other materials incorporated by reference.
termsPage.contactSubtitle: Get in touch with our team

acceptance.title: Acceptance, Commencement & Changes
acceptance.q1: How do I accept the Contract with Impulse and when does the Contract commence?
acceptance.a1: The Contract commences and becomes effective once both parties have signed the contract. By accepting the Contract, you are also agreeing to the terms and conditions contained in any Orders/Materials. Your continued use of a Service will be your acceptance of such terms and conditions and these TOS.
acceptance.q2: Who can make changes to the Contract and how?
acceptance.a2: Only Impulse can make changes to the Contract. Impulse may change the Contract after any Fixed Service Period by giving you at least 30 days advance notice of the change via mail, fax, e-mail or made available electronically. You will be bound by revised versions of this Contract that we send to you. Your continued use of a Service will be your acceptance of such change(s).
acceptance.q3: How long is my Contract with Impulse? How does it renew?
acceptance.a3: The term of any Service will begin on the Commencement Date, and will expire at the end of the Fixed Service Period. Upon expiration of an Initial Service Period, the Service will continue on a Month-to-Month Service Period at Impulse then-applicable rates unless you cancel the applicable Service or unless Impulse or you terminate this Contract.
acceptance.q4: How does the Contract or any Service get terminated?
acceptance.a4: You can terminate the Contract by e-mailing support{'@'}impulse.ky
acceptance.highlightText: You must pay an early termination fee for any Service(s) you terminate prior to the end of any Fixed Service Period. The fees are equal to 50% of the total monthly charges for each early terminated Service, multiplied by the number of months left in the Fixed Service Period.

fees.title: Fees, Payments & Penalties
fees.q1: How does Impulse invoice me? When are payments due?
fees.a1: You must pay all amounts due by the due date stated on the invoice ("Due Date").

requirements.title: Requirements
requirements.q1: Can Impulse require a credit check, credit reference or a security deposit?
requirements.a1: Yes. Impulse may require a credit check, credit references and/or a security deposit prior to project kick off. You agree that Impulse is permitted to use your personally identifiable information in connection with such credit checks and references.

indemnification.title: Indemnification
indemnification.q1: Under what circumstances do I have to make Impulse whole?
indemnification.a1: You agree to indemnify, defend and hold harmless Impulse from any and all claims, demands, actions, costs, expenses, damages and liabilities (including reasonable legal fees and expenses) that arise in any way from your use and/or receipt of the Services and/or Equipment, including but not limited to claims of slander and intellectual property infringement. Your obligation extends to Impulse and its affiliated companies, and their shareholders, directors, officers, employees, agents, and contractors.

liability.title: Impulse's Liability
liability.text: Impulse is not responsible for any damages suffered in connection with this Contract, including damages that are direct, indirect, consequential, incidental, economic, exemplary or punitive. These include, but aren't limited to, damages such as loss of business opportunity or loss of data. Impulse is not responsible for any failure of the Service(s) or Equipment due to any cause beyond its reasonable control (e.g. acts of war, terrorism, civil unrest, sabotage, labour difficulties, natural disasters, power outage, flood, embargo, unavoidable catastrophe, explosion, act or omission of a governmental authority, or act or omissions of a service provider).

general.title: General
general.q1: What laws apply to the Contract?
general.a1: The laws of the Cayman Islands govern.
general.q2: Can you and/or Impulse transfer this Contract?
general.a2: You may not transfer or assign this Contract, your account, the Services without Impulse's prior written consent. Impulse may transfer or assign all or part of this Contract at any time without notice or consent.
general.q3: What if parts of this Contract become unenforceable or Impulse does not enforce a right?
general.a3: If any part of this Contract becomes outdated, prohibited or unenforceable, the remaining terms will continue to apply. Even if Impulse decides not to enforce any part of this Contract for any period of time, the term still remains valid and Impulse can enforce it in the future.
